name: twingate-assistant
description: Twingate ZTNA implementation assistant — architecture, deployment, IaC, troubleshooting. Use this plugin whenever working with Twingate, zero trust network access, or any of: connectors, remote networks, resources, security policies, identity providers, device trust, DNS filtering, exit networks, the Twingate API, Twingate Terraform provider, Twingate Pulumi provider, Twingate Kubernetes operator, Twingate gateway, or SSH PAM.
